column1: A single continuous medium close-up in a quiet studio. A woman faces the camera, her face fully visible and well lit, and clearly says, <S>The morning train arrives at seven.<E> Her lip motion follows the sentence. Stable camera, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Clear female speech with faint indoor room tone.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous two-shot in a bright kitchen. A man on the left looks at a woman on the right and says, <S>Did you close the window?<E> The woman turns toward him and replies, <S>Yes, just before the rain.<E> Both faces remain visible while they take turns speaking. Stable camera, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Clear alternating male and female speech with light kitchen ambience.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous shot in a modern living room. A man sits on a sofa and clearly says, <S>I am watching the game now.<E> Behind him, a large television is playing a loud soccer match with crowd cheering and referee whistles. The man is visible from head to waist, his face is well lit, and his lip motion follows his speech. Stable camera, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Clear male speech, soccer crowd cheering, referee whistles, and television commentary.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous shot in a rehearsal room. A standing musician raises both hands, claps twice, strikes a small drum once, then closes a wooden door; each visible action is followed immediately by its matching sound. Stable camera, no cuts, no speech. <AUDCAP>Two sharp hand claps, one deep drum hit, and one wooden door slam synchronized with the visible events.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous wide shot in a sunlit gym. An athlete runs across the frame, jumps, spins in the air, lands, and continues moving while remaining fully visible. The camera stays fixed and there are no cuts. <AUDCAP>Fast footsteps, clothing movement, a brief landing thump, and natural gym reverberation; no speech.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous wide shot of an empty rocky beach during light rain. Waves break against the rocks, wind moves the grass, and two seabirds cross the sky. No people, no speech, no music, stable camera, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Ocean waves, steady wind, light rainfall, and distant seabird calls only.<ENDAUDCAP>
